gaps: No existing test case covers the specific scenario of placing an earbud back into the charge case, closing the lid, and verifying the app's Home screen status updates correctly (e.g., that the primary earbud does not remain showing as connected with a charging icon).

No test validates the state transition when only ONE earbud is returned to the case while the other remains out — the bug specifically involves asymmetric earbud placement (left returned, right still out) and then lid closure.

No test covers the lifecycle of earbud connection state after lid-close events: the bug involves the app failing to update the UI when the lid is closed after partial earbud return. This is a state synchronization gap between hardware (case lid sensor, earbud docking) and app UI.
No test validates the 'charging icon' display logic on the Home screen — specifically whether an earbud can incorrectly show a charging indicator while simultaneously showing as 'connected'.
No test covers the sequence: remove both earbuds → place one back → close lid → observe app status. This specific multi-step state transition is untested.
No test validates the Home screen device status widget behavior for Voyager Free 60+ when the charge case lid is closed with earbuds in non-standard configurations (one in, one out, then lid closed).

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-001: Verify Home screen status when both earbuds are placed in case and lid closed
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → ensure Home screen is displayed.
Remove both earbuds from the charge case and wear them. Verify Home screen shows both earbuds as 'Connected' with no charging icon.
Place both earbuds back into the charge case correctly (left into left slot, right into right slot).
Close the charge case lid.
Observe the Home screen device status widget for at least 10 seconds.
Wait for any pending UI refresh (do not manually refresh or navigate away).
generated_testcases.expected: Within 5 seconds of lid closure, the Home screen should update to show both earbuds as 'Disconnected' or 'In Case'. Neither earbud should display a 'Connected' status. No charging icon should appear next to either earbud on the Home screen. The device status widget should reflect that the earbuds are in the case with lid closed.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-002: Verify Home screen status when left earbud is returned to case, right remains out, then lid closed
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → ensure Home screen is displayed.
Remove both earbuds from the charge case and wear them. Verify Home screen shows both earbuds as 'Connected'.
Remove the left earbud from your ear and place it into the left slot of the charge case. Keep the right earbud in your ear.
Close the charge case lid while the right earbud remains out and in use.
Observe the Home screen device status widget for at least 15 seconds.
Do not navigate away from the Home screen during this observation period.
generated_testcases.expected: The Home screen should correctly show the left earbud as 'In Case' or 'Disconnected' with no charging icon. The right earbud should remain shown as 'Connected' and actively in use. The left earbud must NOT display as 'Connected' with a charging icon simultaneously. The app should reflect the asymmetric state: one earbud in case (lid closed), one earbud active.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-003: Verify Home screen status when right earbud is returned to case, left remains out, then lid closed
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → ensure Home screen is displayed.
Remove both earbuds from the charge case and wear them. Verify Home screen shows both earbuds as 'Connected'.
Remove the right earbud from your ear and place it into the right slot of the charge case. Keep the left earbud in your ear.
Close the charge case lid while the left earbud remains out and in use.
Observe the Home screen device status widget for at least 15 seconds.
Do not navigate away from the Home screen during this observation period.
generated_testcases.expected: The Home screen should correctly show the right earbud as 'In Case' or 'Disconnected' with no charging icon. The left earbud should remain shown as 'Connected' and actively in use. The right earbud must NOT display as 'Connected' with a charging icon simultaneously. The app should reflect the asymmetric state: one earbud in case (lid closed), one earbud active.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-004: Verify charging icon does not appear on Home screen for a 'Connected' earbud after lid closure
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → navigate to Home screen.
Remove both earbuds from the charge case and wear them. Confirm Home screen shows both as 'Connected' with no charging icon.
Place the left earbud back into the charge case slot. Keep the right earbud in your ear.
Close the charge case lid.
Observe the Home screen device status widget. Check if the left earbud shows a charging icon (e.g., battery icon with lightning bolt) while also showing as 'Connected'.
Open the charge case lid, remove the left earbud, place both earbuds back, close lid, and repeat the observation.
generated_testcases.expected: At no point should any earbud display a charging icon (lightning bolt on battery indicator) while simultaneously showing a 'Connected' status on the Home screen. An earbud placed in the case with lid closed should show as 'In Case' or 'Disconnected' — not 'Connected'. The charging icon should only appear in the correct context (e.g., earbuds in case with lid open, or in the charge case settings screen).

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-005: Verify Home screen status after full cycle: remove both → place one back → close lid → observe
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → ensure Home screen is displayed.
Remove both earbuds from the charge case and wear them. Verify Home screen shows both as 'Connected'.
Play audio media (music or test tone) on the connected phone to confirm active audio streaming.
Remove the right earbud from your ear and place it into the right slot of the charge case.
Close the charge case lid while the left earbud remains in your ear with audio playing.
Observe the Home screen device status widget for 20 seconds. Note any changes to the right earbud status.
While still observing, open the charge case lid. Note any status changes.
Remove the right earbud from the case and place it back in your ear. Observe status changes.
generated_testcases.expected: Step 5-6: After lid closure, the right earbud should update to 'In Case' or 'Disconnected' within 5 seconds. The left earbud should remain 'Connected'. Audio should continue playing through the left earbud. The right earbud must NOT show as 'Connected' with a charging icon. Step 7: When lid is opened, the right earbud status should update to reflect it is in the case with lid open (e.g., 'In Case' with charging icon if applicable). Step 8: When the right earbud is removed and worn, both earbuds should show as 'Connected' and audio should resume in both.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-006: Verify Home screen device status widget after lid close with one earbud partially docked
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → ensure Home screen is displayed.
Remove both earbuds from the charge case and wear them.
Remove the left earbud and place it into the left slot of the charge case, but do NOT fully seat it (leave it slightly raised so charging contacts may not engage).
Close the charge case lid gently (the partially seated earbud may prevent full lid closure or may close with pressure).
Observe the Home screen device status widget for 15 seconds.
Open the lid, fully seat the left earbud, close the lid again, and observe status changes.
generated_testcases.expected: Step 4-5: The app should reflect the actual hardware state. If the earbud is not fully docked, the app should not show a charging icon for that earbud. The status should be consistent with the hardware detection (e.g., 'Disconnected' or 'In Case' without charging). The app must not show a 'Connected' status with a charging icon for the partially docked earbud. Step 6: When fully seated and lid closed, the earbud should correctly show as 'In Case' with appropriate status.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-007: Verify state synchronization after app backgrounding and foregrounding during lid-close event
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → ensure Home screen is displayed.
Remove both earbuds from the charge case and wear them. Verify both show as 'Connected'.
Remove the left earbud and place it into the left slot of the charge case.
Press the Home button to background the Poly Studio Mobile app (app goes to background).
Close the charge case lid while the app is in the background.
Wait 10 seconds, then reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app by tapping its icon (not from recent apps).
Observe the Home screen device status widget immediately upon app foregrounding.
Wait an additional 10 seconds and observe if any delayed UI update occurs.
generated_testcases.expected: Upon foregrounding the app, the Home screen should correctly reflect the current state: left earbud shown as 'In Case' or 'Disconnected', right earbud shown as 'Connected'. The left earbud must NOT show as 'Connected' with a charging icon. The app should synchronize its state with the hardware upon returning to foreground, even if the lid-close event occurred while the app was backgrounded.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-008: Verify state synchronization after app force-kill and relaunch during lid-close event
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → ensure Home screen is displayed.
Remove both earbuds from the charge case and wear them. Verify both show as 'Connected'.
Remove the right earbud and place it into the right slot of the charge case.
Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe away from recent apps or force stop via Settings → Apps).
Close the charge case lid while the app is not running.
Wait 10 seconds.
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app. Navigate to the Home screen for [Voyager Free 60+].
Observe the Home screen device status widget for 15 seconds.
generated_testcases.expected: Upon relaunch, the app should correctly synchronize with the current hardware state. The right earbud should be shown as 'In Case' or 'Disconnected'. The left earbud should be shown as 'Connected'. The right earbud must NOT show as 'Connected' with a charging icon. The app should correctly read the current state from the earbuds/case upon connection, not rely on stale cached state.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-009: Verify Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect cycle after lid-close with one earbud in case
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → ensure Home screen is displayed.
Remove both earbuds from the charge case and wear them. Verify both show as 'Connected'.
Remove the left earbud and place it into the left slot of the charge case.
Close the charge case lid.
From the phone's Bluetooth settings, disconnect the Voyager Free 60+ device.
Wait 5 seconds, then reconnect from Bluetooth settings.
Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and observe the Home screen device status widget.
Open the charge case lid, remove the left earbud, wear it, and observe status updates.
generated_testcases.expected: Step 5-7: After Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect, the app should correctly show the left earbud as 'In Case' or 'Disconnected' and the right earbud as 'Connected'. The state should persist across the Bluetooth cycle. Step 8: When the left earbud is removed and worn, both earbuds should show as 'Connected'.

generated_testcases.title: TC-VF60-010: Verify Home screen status when both earbuds are in case, lid closed, then one earbud removed without opening lid
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → ensure Home screen is displayed.
Remove both earbuds from the charge case and wear them. Verify both show as 'Connected'.
Place both earbuds back into the charge case and close the lid.
Verify Home screen shows both earbuds as 'In Case' or 'Disconnected'.
Open the charge case lid, remove ONLY the right earbud, and close the lid again (left earbud remains in case with lid closed).
Observe the Home screen device status widget for 15 seconds.
Open the lid, place the right earbud back, close lid, and repeat with the left earbud.
generated_testcases.expected: Step 4: Both earbuds should show as 'In Case' or 'Disconnected'. Step 5-6: After removing only the right earbud and closing the lid, the right earbud should show as 'Connected' and the left earbud should show as 'In Case' or 'Disconnected'. Neither earbud should show a 'Connected' status with a charging icon. The app should correctly handle the asymmetric state where one earbud is removed from a closed case.
